spec.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $__interval), avg(cpu_usage) AS "CPU Usage" FROM server_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $__interval), avg(rx_errors_per_second) AS "RX Errors" FROM server_network_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' AND interface_name = '$interface' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp, $__interval), avg(tx_errors_per_second) AS "TX Errors" FROM server_network_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' AND interface_name = '$interface' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT cpu_usage FROM server_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT (mem_usage / mem_total) * 100 AS memory_used FROM server_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

spec.definition: SELECT interface_name AS __text, interface_name AS __value FROM server_network_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' GROUP BY interface_name ORDER BY CASE WHEN interface_name LIKE 'eth%' THEN 0 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'en%' THEN 1 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'wlan%' THEN 2 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'wlp%' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, interface_name

spec.query: SELECT interface_name AS __text, interface_name AS __value FROM server_network_metrics WHERE server_id = '${server}' GROUP BY interface_name ORDER BY CASE WHEN interface_name LIKE 'eth%' THEN 0 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'en%' THEN 1 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'wlan%' THEN 2 WHEN interface_name LIKE 'wlp%' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, interface_name
